pattern: In a star graph the center touches every edge, so it is the node shared by any two edges.
hints: The center is the only node that appears in every single edge.
You do not need to scan all edges; the center must appear in the first two.
Return whichever endpoint of the first edge also shows up in the second edge.

edge_inputs.description: minimum three-node star with two edges
center appears second in the first edge
center listed first in both edges
center positions swap between the two edges

stress.description: valid star with a random center and shuffled edge endpoints
